result.q3_skip_reason: Task premise was incorrect: lethal_retrieve is not confined to the retired script. It is a live function defined at src/polaris_graph/wiki/mesh/retrieve/lethal.py:95 and imported by two ACTIVE test files (tests/integration/test_mesh_e2e.py:31 and tests/unit/test_mesh_lethal_retrieve.py:44) in addition to scripts/_retired_2026_06_14/pg_mesh_preflight.py:28. The name is also embedded in a persisted test filename (test_mesh_lethal_retrieve.py) and appears throughout .codex audit logs as a fixture path. This fails codex rename condition (b) (must NOT be referenced as an import / fixture path / persisted label elsewhere), so per the codex decision it is SKIPPED rather than renamed. Renaming would require touching two live test files and renaming a test file, well beyond the stated 'retired dir, low risk' scope.
result.collection_after: 16738 tests collected, 11 errors (== 16738/11, expected; the 11 are pre-existing env-dependent collection errors unchanged by these edits)
